yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Hackers_Actively_Exploiting_Critical_Web {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Hackers Actively Exploiting Critical WebLogic RCE Vulnerabilities in Attacks"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "WebLogic" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Operation_TrueChaos_0Day_Exploitation_Ag {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Operation TrueChaos: 0-Day Exploitation Against Southeast Asian Government Targe"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "TrueChaos" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CISA_tells_federal_agencies_to_patch_Cit {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for CISA tells federal agencies to patch Citrix NetScaler bug by Thursday"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "NetScaler" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_TeamPCP_Supply_Chain_Campaign_Update_004 {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 004 - Databricks Investigating Alleged Com"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "AstraZeneca" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_ClickFix_Campaigns_Targeting_Windows_and {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for ClickFix Campaigns Targeting Windows and macOS"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "ClickFix" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_StopRansomware_Interlock {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for #StopRansomware: Interlock"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "StopRansomware" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Apple_urges_iPhone_users_to_update_as_Co {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Apple urges iPhone users to update as Coruna and DarkSword exploit kits emerge"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "DarkSword" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_The_Proliferation_of_DarkSword_iOS_Explo {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for The Proliferation of DarkSword: iOS Exploit Chain Adopted by Multiple Threat Act"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "DarkSword" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_BeatBanker_A_dualmode_Android_Trojan {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for BeatBanker: A dual‑mode Android Trojan"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-05"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "BeatBanker" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
